name: agentlayerweb
description: AgentLayerWeb - The interaction layer for AI-native web applications.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/react build && bun run --cwd packages/vue build && bun run --cwd packages/svelte build && bun run --cwd packages/vite-plugin build && bun run --cwd Website build && bun run --cwd examples/nextjs build && bun run --cwd examples/vite build
